name: flutter-dart-code-review
description: 中文优先：用于FlutterDart代码审查相关任务，帮助识别、设计、实现或验证对应工作流。English keywords: Library-agnostic Flutter/Dart code review checklist covering widget best practices, state management patterns (BLoC, Riverpod, Provider, GetX, MobX, Signals), Dart idioms, performance, accessibility, security, and clean architecture.
